nodes.name: Fetch curated YouTube channels
nodes.notes: Reads active YouTube channels from the curated_channels table. The HTTP Request node (v4.2) automatically outputs each array element as a separate item, so no SplitOut node is needed.

nodes.name: YouTube: latest videos from channel
nodes.notes: Fetches the 10 most recent videos for each curated channel via YouTube Data API v3.

nodes.name: Map channel videos to external_content rows
YouTube: topic-based search
nodes.notes: Topic-based search for general educational content. Runs in parallel with channel fetching. Adjust the 'q' query param to match your target audience.

nodes.name: Map topic videos to external_content rows

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { platform: $json.platform, external_id: $json.external_id, title: $json.title, description: $json.description, thumbnail_url: $json.thumbnail_url, embed_url: $json.embed_url, author_name: $json.author_name, author_avatar_url: $json.author_avatar_url, view_count: $json.view_count, like_count: $json.like_count, tags: $json.tags, duration_seconds: $json.duration_seconds, published_at: $json.published_at } }}

nodes.name: Upsert into external_content
nodes.notes: Uses Supabase upsert (Prefer: resolution=merge-duplicates) to avoid duplicates based on the unique(platform, external_id) constraint.

main.node: Map channel videos to external_content rows
Map topic videos to external_content rows
